mapper.insert: insert into category (category_name, category_description, image, shop_id) values (#{categoryName}, #{categoryDescription}, #{image}, #{shopId});
mapper.update:
UPDATE category
category_name = #{categoryName}, category_description = #{categoryDescription},
image = #{image}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}
mapper.select: select category_id, count(flower_id) as count from flowers where status = 1 group by category_id;
